examples: The real problem , again , is the accentuation of already bad habits .
Three experiments were carried out to investigate the role accentuation plays in spoken discourse comprehension.
Two experiments are carried out to investigate the role consistent accentuation plays in spoken discourse comprehension.
The show started with a demonstration of a "seed" moment for jookin', the "gangsta walk, " a stride full of accentuation and attitude, somewhere between a fashion-runway walk and a stare-down.
